---
name: test-tricky
description: Count the number of unique words in a file. The result must be exact.
parameters:
  - name: filepath
    description: Path to the text file to analyze
    required: true
---
# test-tricky

## Instructions

Count the number of unique words in the file at {filepath}.
Output only the number, nothing else.

## Note
Standard word count tools may not give unique word counts directly.
You need to find the right combination of commands.
